## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work, if you have ideas.

## Additional Context

Add any screenshots, mockups, or other context here.
